lines.speaker: Silk merchant
lines.text: I buy silk. If you ever want to sell any silk, bring it here.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello. I have some fine silk from far away to sell to you.

lines.speaker: Silk merchant
lines.text: Ah I may be interested in that. What sort of price were you looking at per piece of silk?

lines.speaker: Silk merchant
lines.text: 80 coins? That's a bit steep! How about 40 coins?

lines.speaker: Silk merchant
lines.text: You'll never get that much for it. I'll be generous and give you 50 for it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'll give it to you for 60.

lines.speaker: Silk merchant
lines.text: You drive a hard bargain, but I guess that will have to do.

lines.speaker: Silk merchant
lines.text: Don't be ridiculous! That is far too much. You insult me with that price.

sections.title: Overhead dialogue when the player is caught attempting to steal from the Silk stall
Overhead dialogue when the player has recently stolen silk
